title: Tanacetopsis goloskokovii

intro: Tanacetopsis goloskokovii, also known as Siberian wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in the treatment of various conditions such as colds, flu, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Tanacetopsis goloskokovii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Tanacetopsis goloskokovii is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into various herbal remedies and supplements.
